textByHash.069e68044cd61e88a61b67ab8534e50108836889: Thanks, human. You can have this other book that I don't want.
textByHash.3b834dc6bee7a723a31272b8f60c87513255585c: It'd really help with my learning if you'd find my book for me. Will you?
textByHash.6d890ef6638a613592cb2182dfb1dcc6753065c1: Hey, human, can you do me a favour? That Librarian won't help me find a book.
textByHash.7d7647b57190ce87e4ed51512e68ea301ebe4f8b: Aren't you helping someone else at the moment? Don't let me interrupt.
textByHash.9f9492fdb2aa74d70a06f2cc29573d6f1dcf2593: Thanks for finding my book. I'm learning such a lot here.
textByHash.b1d548ea96414b67a7e47883e79be04a2766c126: I'm from the Stronghold. Mostly I teach magic, and stuff like that. Anyway, I heard they'd got magic here unlike anything I'd ever seen, so I came to learn what I could.
textByHash.cd44990d8d966e01de814d2121238e4eef1149f3: Have you found my book, human? ''
textByHash.e72bfa6b158c9d154d092b4322f2c93ccecf978e: If you do, I bet the Arceuus citizens will be grateful for you helping their customers. They must know their Librarian's useless.
